seo.title: Quiet Moth Artz | Creative Consultant, Website Designer, Graphic Designer & Songwriter
seo.description: Quiet Moth Artz helps artists, entrepreneurs, small businesses, and brands with websites, graphic design, songwriting, hooks, creative consulting, and automated creative systems.

hero.headline: Creative websites, graphics, hooks, and brand systems for artists, entrepreneurs, and small businesses.
hero.subheadline: Quiet Moth Artz helps creators and brands look professional, promote better, and turn ideas into polished digital experiences — from websites and flyers to songwriting and creative consulting.

hookGenerator.title: Free AI Hook Generator
hookGenerator.promoCopy: Need a hook for a song, campaign, slogan, or creative idea? Try my free hook generator, then book Quiet Moth Artz if you want help turning the idea into a finished song, brand, flyer, or website.
hookGenerator.ctaCopy: Want me to write the full hook, song concept, or brand slogan for you? Book a creative session.
hookGenerator.inputLabel: Topic, artist name, brand name, song idea, or phrase
hookGenerator.inputPlaceholder: Example: new beginning, SquadUp Records, summer single

whyWorkWithMe.title: Why Work With Me
whyWorkWithMe.paragraph: Quiet Moth Artz brings design, writing, music, and systems together so your project feels complete from the first impression to the final call to action.
checklist: Creative direction, not just basic design
Experience with graphics, music, writing, and digital projects
Professional websites built to promote real services
Modern automated workflows that save time

contact.title: Hire Me / Contact
contact.copy: Tell me what you need, and your email app will open with a polished project request ready to send.
contact.detailsPlaceholder: Tell me about the website, graphic, hook, brand, or creative system you need.
